title: Merriway BH01938 100mm (4 inch) Sink Plunger with 225mm (9 inch) Plastic Handle Diameter, White/Black
features: POWERFUL: 100mm (4 inch) diameter plunger cup designed for effective suction. Ideal for unblocking sinks, showers, drains, and toilets. Quickly clears clogs and debris with minimal effort

ERGONOMIC: 225mm (9 inch) plastic handle ensures a comfortable and firm grip. The handle length provides optimal leverage for efficient use. Lightweight design makes it easy to handle for extended periods

VERSATILE: Suitable for use in multiple areas such as kitchens, bathrooms, and utility spaces. Perfect for tackling everyday blockages in sinks and drains. Can be used to clean and maintain a variety of plumbing fixtures

DURABLE: Constructed from high-quality materials for long-lasting performance. The white and black design ensures it blends well in most bathroom or kitchen settings. Built to withstand frequent use without compromising its functionality.
description: From the manufacturer About us Merriway has been established as a manufacturer and distributor of hardware, DIY and furniture fittings to the Trade for more than 22 years. The company embraces the values of competitive on a broad product range backed up with large stocks. Our premises have grown along with the business and now cover a floor area of more than 50,000 sq ft, whilst our workforce numbers close to 100 people. We achieved ISO 9001 accreditation (ISO 9001 in July 2011), upgrading from our previous status of ISO 9002, thereby receiving approval for the quality of our management systems , illustrating how seriously we take these issues and how hard we work at them.
